campaign.name: One Meal One Hope
campaign.mission: To end hunger by ensuring that every individual has access to at least one nutritious meal every day while promoting dignity, compassion, and sustainable community development.
campaign.vision: A world where no one sleeps hungry and every community has equal access to safe, nutritious food.

causes.title: Poverty
causes.description: Limited income prevents families from accessing sufficient and nutritious food.

causes.title: Food Waste
causes.description: Large quantities of edible food are discarded while millions remain hungry.

causes.title: Climate Change
causes.description: Extreme weather, droughts, and floods reduce agricultural productivity and food availability.

causes.title: Conflict
causes.description: Wars and displacement interrupt food production and humanitarian supply chains.

causes.title: Unemployment
causes.description: Job insecurity limits the ability of families to consistently afford healthy meals.

causes.title: Inflation
causes.description: Rising food prices make nutritious meals inaccessible for vulnerable households.

impactAreas.title: Meal Distribution
impactAreas.description: Providing nutritious meals to individuals and families facing food insecurity.

impactAreas.title: Community Kitchens
impactAreas.description: Supporting local kitchens that prepare and distribute fresh meals every day.

impactAreas.title: School Nutrition
impactAreas.description: Helping children receive healthy meals so they can learn and thrive.

impactAreas.title: Emergency Relief
impactAreas.description: Delivering food during natural disasters, crises, and humanitarian emergencies.

impactAreas.title: Volunteer Network
impactAreas.description: Building a community of volunteers dedicated to serving meals and spreading awareness.

impactAreas.title: Awareness Campaigns
impactAreas.description: Educating communities about hunger, nutrition, and sustainable food practices.

goals: Ensure every individual has access to at least one nutritious meal each day.
Reduce food waste through responsible redistribution.
Promote sustainable agriculture and nutrition awareness.
Collaborate with NGOs, schools, businesses, and local communities.

howYouCanHelp.title: Donate
howYouCanHelp.description: Every contribution helps provide meals for individuals and families in need.

howYouCanHelp.title: Volunteer
howYouCanHelp.description: Join meal preparation, food distribution, awareness campaigns, or fundraising events.

howYouCanHelp.title: Partner
howYouCanHelp.description: Businesses and organizations can support through CSR initiatives and sponsorships.

howYouCanHelp.title: Spread Awareness
howYouCanHelp.description: Share stories, educate your community, and inspire others to take action against hunger.

quotes.author: Whisper with Vihaan
quotes.text: One meal may satisfy hunger for a day, but kindness can nourish hope for a lifetime.

quotes.author: One Meal One Hope
quotes.text: No act of generosity is ever too small when it feeds a hungry heart.

quotes.author: Campaign
quotes.text: Together, we can transform compassion into action and hope into lasting change.

faq.question: How does my donation help?
faq.answer: Donations support meal preparation, food distribution, community kitchens, and emergency hunger relief initiatives.

faq.question: Can I volunteer?
faq.answer: Yes. Volunteers can participate in food drives, meal distribution, community outreach, fundraising, photography, and storytelling.

faq.question: Do you work with corporate partners?
faq.answer: Yes. We welcome CSR partnerships, sponsorships, and collaborations with organizations that share our mission.

faq.question: Can I organize a local food drive?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We encourage schools, communities, and businesses to organize food donation and awareness events.
